description_long: This is a commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage, painted primarily white with the Lufthansa logo and branding in dark gray and blue. The aircraft features a pair of swept-back, low-mounted wings with underwing twin turbofan engines, and a conventional tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer adorned with the Lufthansa emblem. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible along the side for both cockpit and passenger areas. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, typical of modern commercial airliners, and the overall design is optimized for aerodynamic efficiency and passenger transport.
description: A white Lufthansa commercial airplane with swept low-mounted wings, twin underwing turbofan engines, and a blue-branded tail. The fuselage is streamlined with a forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Lufthansa branding, blue tail fin with logo, and both engines under the wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetrical placement of the engines and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the passenger windows and tail design.
description_view_3: Angled front-top view emphasizing the wing sweep, engine placement, and the overall aerodynamic shape of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, typical of commercial airliners.
